name: strapi-plugin-smoothcdn
description: Boost Strapi performance by connecting media and API assets to Smooth CDN with built-in optimization and scalable delivery pipelines.

scripts.check:server: node --check strapi-server.js && find server -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check

strapi.name: smoothcdn
strapi.description: Core Smooth CDN connection plus modular acceleration features for Strapi.
